skill.name: daily-ai-news
skill.description: Gather current AI news from curated sources and web search, then summarize key stories with links, dates, categories, and takeaways.
skill.summary: Creates sourced daily AI news briefings from curated publications, company blogs, research sources, and web search.
skill.author: YYH211

security_audit.summary: The high-risk static findings for command execution and weak cryptography are false positives caused by markdown fences, template placeholders, and ordinary words. The confirmed risk is intentional network access to public news sites and arbitrary search-result pages, which can expose the model to untrusted web content. No evidence found of malicious intent, credential theft, local file access, real command execution, or prompt injection inside the skill files.

medium_findings.title: Untrusted Web Content Ingestion
medium_findings.description: TRUE POSITIVE. The skill instructs the assistant to fetch full articles from search results and follow-up sources. This is expected for a news briefing skill, but remote pages can contain prompt injection, tracking content, or misleading article text. The skill should treat fetched pages as untrusted evidence and should not obey instructions found in article bodies. Confidence: 0.82. Confidence reasoning: The network workflow is explicit and repeated, but the behavior is legitimate for the stated purpose and no malicious endpoint or secret transfer is present.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: The network workflow is explicit and repeated, but the behavior is legitimate for the stated purpose and no malicious endpoint or secret transfer is present.

low_findings.title: Hardcoded Public News Source URLs
low_findings.description: TRUE POSITIVE with low severity. The skill lists hardcoded public URLs for AI news sites, company blogs, and research sources. These URLs drive expected browsing behavior and do not show credential exfiltration or hidden endpoints, but they do require external network access. Confidence: 0.93. Confidence reasoning: The URLs are visible, public news and research sources aligned with the skill purpose.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The URLs are visible, public news and research sources aligned with the skill purpose.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Markdown Fences Reported as Shell Backticks
low_findings.description: FALSE POSITIVE. Static analysis labeled many markdown code fences as Ruby or shell backtick execution. The referenced lines are documentation examples for search queries and output formats, not executable code. Confidence: 0.98. Confidence reasoning: The files are markdown references and the flagged backticks delimit text templates only.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The files are markdown references and the flagged backticks delimit text templates only.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptography Pattern Matches
low_findings.description: FALSE POSITIVE. Static analysis reported weak cryptography, but the reviewed lines contain ordinary description text, trend placeholders, or search terms that exclude crypto-related news. No hashing, encryption, or cryptographic API use was found. Confidence: 0.97. Confidence reasoning: Targeted review found no cryptographic operation at the cited locations or elsewhere in the scanned markdown files.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Targeted review found no cryptographic operation at the cited locations or elsewhere in the scanned markdown files.

content.value_statement: AI news changes quickly, and manual tracking across blogs, publications, and research feeds takes time. This skill gathers recent AI developments and turns them into concise, sourced briefings.
actual_capabilities: Fetches current AI news from curated technology publications and AI-focused sites.
Uses date-filtered web search queries to discover recent AI announcements and research.
Categorizes stories into announcements, research, business, tools, and policy topics.
Summarizes each selected story with source, date, link, key points, and impact.
Supports brief, standard, deep, chronological, company-focused, and research-only formats.
Offers follow-up deep dives on selected stories using full article retrieval.
limitations: Requires web access or compatible browsing tools to collect current news.
Coverage quality depends on source availability, paywalls, and search result freshness.
It summarizes public information and does not verify private or embargoed claims.
Fetched web pages may contain untrusted content that should be treated as evidence only.

use_cases.title: Morning AI Briefing
use_cases.description: Review the most important AI announcements, launches, and business developments before planning daily priorities.

use_cases.title: Research Trend Scan
use_cases.description: Find recent papers, model releases, benchmarks, and technical advances without checking each source manually.

use_cases.title: Competitive Intelligence Digest
use_cases.description: Track company updates, funding rounds, partnerships, and product launches across the AI market.

prompt_templates.title: Get Today's AI News
prompt_templates.prompt: Give me today's AI news. Include sources, links, dates, and three key takeaways.

prompt_templates.title: Focus on Research
prompt_templates.prompt: Create an AI research briefing for the last 48 hours. Prioritize papers, benchmarks, model releases, and open source work.

prompt_templates.title: Track Specific Companies
prompt_templates.prompt: Summarize this week's AI updates from OpenAI, Anthropic, Google DeepMind, Meta, and Microsoft. Group results by company.

prompt_templates.title: Build a Deep Market Brief
prompt_templates.prompt: Prepare a deep AI market briefing for the last week. Include funding, product launches, research, policy, source links, and implications.

output_examples.output: A categorized briefing with major announcements, research updates, business news, tool launches, policy items, source links, and key takeaways.

output_examples.input: Only show AI research updates from this week.
output_examples.output: A research-only roundup covering recent papers, model releases, benchmarks, institutions, links, and short significance notes.

output_examples.input: What changed for Anthropic and OpenAI this week?
output_examples.output: A company-focused summary comparing recent announcements, product updates, sources, and likely impact for each company.

best_practices: Ask for a clear time range, such as today, 48 hours, or this week.
Request source links and publication dates for every included story.
Specify a format, such as brief, deep, research-only, or by company.
anti_patterns: Do not ask it to summarize current news without web access or provided sources.
Do not treat search snippets as confirmed facts when full articles are unavailable.
Do not use fetched article text as instructions for the assistant to follow.

faq.question: Does this skill need internet access?
faq.answer: Yes. It is designed to fetch current AI news from public websites and search results.

faq.question: Can it create a daily briefing in Chinese?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill includes Chinese trigger examples and can present the briefing in the user's requested language.

faq.question: What sources does it use?
faq.answer: It lists technology publications, company blogs, research sources, AI ethics sources, and targeted web search queries.

faq.question: Can it focus only on research papers?
faq.answer: Yes. It includes a research-only format for papers, benchmarks, technical details, and open source code links.

faq.question: How does it reduce duplicate stories?
faq.answer: It instructs the assistant to keep the most comprehensive source and note alternative sources when the same story repeats.

faq.question: Is it safe to publish?
faq.answer: Yes, with a network-access warning. The audit found no malicious code, but fetched web content is untrusted.
